name: herder
description: Execute dependency-aware implementation-plan backlogs with isolated implementer, reviewer, and rescue agents.

interface.shortDescription: Execute plan backlogs with specialized agents.
interface.longDescription: Herder schedules dependency-aware implementation plans, independently reviews candidates, rescues failures, and integrates verified work transactionally.
defaultPrompt: Install Herder's agent roles for this project.
Fire the implementation plans in this repository.
